title: spiraea tarokoensis
intro: Spiraea tarokoensis, also known as Taroko spiraea or Formosan meadowsweet, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive issues. Spiraea tarokoensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, as well as dried flower extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
